generated_on: RTX 4070 Laptop (sm_89), 8 GB VRAM, 32 GB RAM, Windows 11
recommended_mode_rationale: Fast mode drift 0.90 exceeds ADR-004 strict gate by 1.8×. Argmax 4/4 holds in fast mode for the 4-position fixture, so chat / completion workloads with greedy or low-temperature sampling MAY use fast mode at the operator's discretion; any workload requiring numerical equivalence to F64 ground truth must use certified mode.
per_tensor_policy_status: Schema v2.0.0 (M10.3.1.1) — structural heuristic from GPTQ / SmoothQuant literature: FFN tolerates BF16-TC drift more readily than attention. FFN gate/up/down projections take fast; Q/K/V/O attention projections, lm_head, and layer norms fall through to certified. Empirical per-tensor sensitivity analysis (M10.3.1.2+) may refine these overrides; the v2 default-conservative heuristic is the lower-risk starting point given TinyLlama's whole-model fast-mode drift overshoots ADR-004 by 1.8×.
